title: noccaea ochroleuca
intro: Noccaea ochroleuca, also known as yellow mountain saxifrage, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of various skin conditions. Noccaea ochroleuca can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
